bug.description: protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements

prompt:
There is a protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements downstream of function pack_rx_ulsch_indication_body_value in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/nfapi subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/nfapi/src/nfapi_p7.c:1788.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
